method: Per strong-band portfolio item, derive: idea_at = earliest ChatGPT convo first_date whose title contains item name (case-insensitive substring), fallback to cluster seed-term match; build_at = earliest CC session first_ts whose first_user_msg contains item name; ship_at = fs_temporal ctime joined by (name, surface); last_active_at = fs_temporal mtime. Lags in days. flow_pattern deterministic: parallel if |lag_idea_to_build| <= 7d, else talk_leads / build_leads by sign. no_talk if no ChatGPT hit at all, no_build if ChatGPT hit but no CC hit. Caveat 'substring_fp_risk' attached to cluster_fallback ideas in audio_music or productivity_skills.
